message:
🐛 fix: send button hidden for missions with long descriptions (#2884) (#2902)

Remove overflow-hidden from the input/actions container in MissionChat
that was clipping the send button when the chat header had a long
description (e.g. "Configure Multi-Tenancy Framework (Three Shades of
Isolation)"). Also add line-clamp-2 to the description text to prevent
excessively tall headers from consuming sidebar space.

Closes #2884

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
